Oracc: SAAo/SAA01 — The Correspondence of Sargon II, Part I: Letters from Assyria and the West

SAA 01 127. (no title) (CT 53 818)[via saao/saa01]

Obverse
o 1o 1

[a-na LUGAL be-lí]-ía

(1) [To the king], my [lord: your servant Kiṣir-Aššur. Good] health to [the king, my lord!

o 22

[ARAD-ka mki-ṣir—aš-šur lu] DI-mu a-⸢na⸣

o 33

[LUGAL be-lí-ía ša LUGAL] ⸢be⸣-lí iš-⸢pur-an-ni⸣

(3) As to what the king] my lord wrote to me:

o 44

[ma-a x x x x]-ia ina IGI

(4) "[......] in the presence

o 55

[x x x x x x]+⸢x⸣ a-na-ku

(5) [of ......]!" I

o 66

[x x x x up]-⸢ta⸣-at-ti-iu-u

(6) [......] they discharged

o 77

[x x x x KI].TA-uš-šú ip-taq-⸢du⸣

(7) [......] appointed under him

o 88

[x x x x]-⸢ni⸣ ú-sa-ḫi-ru

(8) [......] again

o 99

[x x x up]-⸢ta⸣-at-ti-iu-u

(9) [......] they discharged

o 1010

[x x x LÚv.DIB]—⸢KUŠ⸣.PA-MEŠ šu-ú

(10) [......] he is a [chariot d]river

rest broken away

(Break)

Reverse
rr beginning broken away

r 1'1'

[x x x x x] ⸢URU.NINA?⸣ [x x]

(r 1) [......] Nineveh [...]

r 2'2'

[x x x x]-⸢MEŠ⸣ ša URU.ŠÀ—⸢URU⸣ [x x]-li-šú-nu*

(r 2) [......] of the Inner City [...] their

r 3'3'

[x x x ša] ⸢URU⸣.arba-ìl ša URU.[x x]

(r 3) [...... of] Arbela and [...]

r 4'4'

[x x x x x] LÚv.qa-tin-ni

(r 4) [......] tiller

r 5'5'

[x x x x x x x]-⸢bu⸣-tú

r 6'6'

[x x x x x x x] ⸢da na⸣

r 7'7'

[x x x x x x x x]

(Rest destroyed)

Adapted from Simo Parpola, The Correspondence of Sargon II, Part I: Letters from Assyria and the West (State Archives of Assyria, 1), 1987. Lemmatised by Mikko Luukko, 2009-11, as part of the AHRC-funded research project “Mechanisms of Communication in an Ancient Empire: The Correspondence between the King of Assyria and his Magnates in the 8th Century BC” (AH/F016581/1; University College London) directed by Karen Radner. The annotated edition is released under the Creative Commons Attribution Share-Alike license 3.0. Please cite this page as http://oracc.org/saao/P314227/.
